step1.title: Page grid
step1.content: Your pages appear here. Write one idea per page.

step2.title: Apps menu
step2.content: Switch between Home, Notes, and other apps from here.

step3.title: Search
step3.content: Press Ctrl+K (Cmd+K on Mac) to search anytime.

step4.title: New page
step4.content: Create a new page from the + button below. You can create a blank page, from a URL, or from an image.

step5.title: Page links
step5.content: Type [[ in a page to link to other pages.

step6.title: You're all set
step6.content: You're ready. Try creating your first page.
